items.name: Lace Up Shorts / Red
items.description:

Designed for avatars who want a striking, high-fashion or nightlife-inspired look, these shorts pair perfectly with boots, jackets, and full Pale outfits. Available in multiple standout colorways for maximum styling versatility.
